phrases.intent_en: Ask where to take the boat to Capri from the port
phrases.text_local: Scusi, da dove partono le barche per Capri?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, dah DOH-veh PAR-toh-noh leh BAR-keh per KAH-pree?

responses.english: From Sorrento Port, the south exit of the centre.
responses.phonetic: dal POR-toh dee sor-REN-toh, oo-SHEE-tah sood del CHEN-troh.
responses.french: Dal Porto di Sorrento, uscita sud del centro.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to rent a small boat
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si noleggiano le barche a motore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see noh-lej-JAH-noh leh BAR-keh ah moh-TOH-reh?

responses.english: At Marina Piccola, near the harbour.
responses.phonetic: al mah-REE-nah pee-KOH-lah, vee-CHEE-noh al POR-toh.
responses.french: Al Marina Piccola, vicino al porto.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the cliff-top path with sea views is
phrases.text_local: Scusi, c'è un sentiero sul bordo della scogliera?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, cheh oon sen-TYEH-roh sool BOR-doh DEL-lah skol-YEH-rah?
phrases.cultural_note: Sorrento sits on a cliff top with views of the Bay of Naples — the Villa Comunale park gives the best accessible panorama.

responses.english: Yes, from the Villa Comunale viewpoint.
responses.phonetic: see, dal bel-veh-DEH-reh DEL-lah VEE-lah koh-moo-NAH-leh.
responses.french: Sì, dal Belvedere della Villa Comunale.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to watch the sunset over the sea
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si vede il tramonto sul mare?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see VEH-deh eel trah-MON-toh sool MAH-reh?

responses.english: From the Punta San Francesco viewpoint, excellent view.
responses.phonetic: dal bel-veh-DEH-reh dee POON-tah san fran-CHES-koh, ot-TEE-mah VEES-tah.
responses.french: Dal belvedere di Punta San Francesco, ottima vista.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to get down to the beach from the old town
phrases.text_local: Scusi, come si scende alla spiaggia dal centro?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KOH-meh see SHEN-deh AL-lah SPYAD-jah dal CHEN-troh?

responses.english: By the lift on Via Luigi de Maio, or down the steps.
responses.phonetic: kon lah-shen-SOH-reh een VEE-ah loo-EE-jee deh MAH-yoh, oh per leh SKAH-leh.
responses.french: Con l'ascensore in Via Luigi de Maio, o per le scale.
